nl_query: Show the page count and DPI reported in the scan metadata for each script.
failed_sql: SELECT a.id, a.urn, a.scan_metadata->>'page_count'::INTEGER AS page_count, a.scan_metadata->>'dpi'::INTEGER AS dpi FROM answer_script a WHERE a.scan_metadata IS NOT NULL LIMIT 200;
